Description: All-in wages for direct site labour including on-costs
Short-term or casual workers hired for specific tasks
Labour-only sub-contractors; main contractor supplies materials
Premium pay for overtime hours (time-and-a-half / double time)
Materials incorporated into the permanent works
Formwork, scaffolding, falsework, temporary roads
Consumable tools, PPE, welding rods, grinding discs
Hired plant from external equipment rental company
Company's own plant charged at internal recovery rate
Diesel, petrol, hydraulic oil, engine oil
Maintenance and repair provision for company-owned plant
Specialist sub-contractors requiring certification or unique skills
Domestic sub-contractors selected by main contractor
Nominated by client; main contractor must use them
Site compound establishment and de-establishment costs
Ongoing site facility costs: offices, power, water, security
Project management and supervision staff costs
Safety officer, induction, safety equipment, EMP
CAR insurance, performance bond, public liability
Building plans, environmental permits, statutory approvals
Third-party testing, NDT, hydrotests, ITP management
Risk allowance and contingency provision
Prime Cost and Provisional Sums as specified in BOQ
